verdict: Well-synced and rhythmically accurate, but includes syncopations and hold-tap patterns that are too difficult for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: Tapping D at 71.395 during the U hold requires an 8th-note independent foot release/tap, which is way too complex for beginners on an Easy chart.
Tapping U at 73.380 while holding L presents another difficult 8th-note hold-tap coordination issue.

The syncopated 8th notes following the vocal rhythm (e.g., at 25.924, 31.683, 32.874) are too difficult to read and play for an Easy chart at 151 BPM; these should be simplified to on-beat quarter notes.
